segments.text_ko: 아스칼론 외곽 평원. 새벽. 안개가 걷히면서 — 대륙 전역에서 모인 연합군이 모습을 드러낸다.
segments.text_en: Ascalon outer plains. Dawn. As the mist lifts — the allied forces gathered from across the continent reveal themselves.

segments.speaker: hazel
segments.text_en: This army is missing one thing.

segments.speaker: annette
segments.text_en: What is it?

segments.speaker: hazel
segments.text_ko: 왕의 명령이. 각자의 이유로 여기 섰다. 그것으로 충분하다.
segments.text_en: The king's command. Everyone stands here for their own reasons. That is enough.
The party stands at the head of the allied forces. Thirteen of them.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_en: Let's begin.

segments.speaker: grid
segments.text_en: Wait. One thing.

segments.text_ko: 그리드가 허리춤에서 마리나의 그림을 꺼내 한 번 보고 다시 넣는다.
segments.text_en: Grid pulls Marina's drawing from his belt, looks at it once, and tucks it back.

segments.speaker: grid
segments.text_en: Okay. Let's go.

segments.speaker: grid
segments.text_ko: 해상 봉쇄는 내가 뚫었어. 밀수 네트워크가 서쪽 항구를 열어놨거든.
segments.text_en: I broke through the naval blockade. My smuggling network opened the western port.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_en: Supply lines?

segments.speaker: bartol
segments.text_ko: 내 상선 열다섯 척이 벨마르에서 왔다! 물자는 석 달치!
segments.text_en: My fifteen merchant ships came from Belmar! Three months of supplies!

segments.text_ko: 전투 중 — 시르가 창으로 성벽의 보강 마법진을 관통한다.
segments.text_en: During battle — Cyr's spear pierces the wall's reinforcement magic circle.

segments.speaker: cyr
segments.text_ko: 100년 전 같은 성벽이 있었지. 그때는 혼자 부쉈다. 이번엔 편하네.
segments.text_en: 100 years ago there was a wall like this. I destroyed it alone back then. This time it's easier.
The gate falls. Allied forces pour through.

segments.text_ko: 내성 관문. 비밀경찰 수장 루시드가 정예 부대와 함께 길을 막고 있다.
segments.text_en: Inner castle gate. Secret police chief Lucid blocks the way with his elite unit.

segments.speaker: irene
segments.text_en: It's been a while.

segments.speaker: lucid
segments.text_en: Irene.

segments.speaker: irene
segments.text_en: You killed my husband.

segments.speaker: lucid
segments.text_en: It was an order.

segments.speaker: irene
segments.text_en: Yes. It was an order. Was it the right order?

segments.speaker: irene
segments.text_ko: 대답해, 루시드. 무고한 남자를 죽이고, 어린 아이를 — 내 아들을 죽인 그 명령이. 옳았냐고.
segments.text_en: Answer me, Lucid. The order that killed an innocent man and a child — my son. Was it right?

segments.speaker: lucid
segments.text_en: ...It was not right.

segments.speaker: lucid
segments.text_en: It was not right. I knew. From the beginning.

segments.speaker: irene
segments.text_en: Then why?

segments.speaker: lucid
segments.text_ko: 그것이 질서였으니까. 모르간이 질서였으니까. 하지만 모르간은 더 이상 질서가 아니다. 결계석의 힘을 자기 몸에 넣고 있어. 인간이 아니게 되어가고 있다. 그것은... 질서가 아니라 광기다.
segments.text_en: Because it was order. Because Morgan was order. But Morgan is no longer order. He's putting the barrier stones' power into his own body. He's becoming something inhuman. That is... not order, but madness.

segments.speaker: lucid
segments.text_en: Disband.

segments.text_ko: 비밀경찰들이 무기를 내려놓는다. 루시드가 마지막으로 단검을 바닥에 놓는다.
segments.text_en: The secret police lay down their weapons. Lucid places his dagger on the ground last.

segments.speaker: lucid
segments.text_ko: 내성 지하의 배치도와 모르간의 위치 정보를 넘기겠다. 그 대가로— 처분은 당신이 해라.
segments.text_en: I'll hand over the layout of the inner castle basement and Morgan's position. In return— you decide my fate.

segments.speaker: irene
segments.text_en: ...When the war is over, turn yourself in. Stand trial.

segments.speaker: lucid
segments.text_en: I will.

segments.speaker: irene
segments.text_ko: 죽여줄 줄 알았지? 그렇게 쉽게는 안 끝나.
segments.text_en: You thought I'd kill you? It doesn't end that easily.

segments.text_ko: 모르간의 사저 지하. 실험실. 결계석에서 추출한 에너지가 관을 따라 흐르고 있다. 유리관 안에 생체 실험의 흔적들.
segments.text_en: Morgan's estate basement. Laboratory. Energy extracted from barrier stones flows through tubes. Traces of biological experiments in glass containers.

segments.text_ko: 전투 후. 볼드가 문을 부순다. 방 안. 유리관 하나에 여자가 누워 있다. 몸의 끝부분이 재로 변해가고 있다. 에리스.
segments.text_en: After battle. Voldt breaks down the door. Inside the room. A woman lies in a glass tube. The tips of her body are turning to ash. Eris.

segments.speaker: voldt
segments.text_en: Eris—!

segments.text_ko: 볼드가 유리관을 깨뜨리고 에리스를 안아 꺼낸다.
segments.text_en: Voldt shatters the glass tube and pulls Eris into his arms.

segments.speaker: eris
segments.text_en: ...Voldt?

segments.speaker: voldt
segments.text_en: It's me. I'm here. I came for you.

segments.speaker: eris
segments.text_en: You're late... fool.

segments.speaker: seria
segments.text_ko: 안 돼... 결계석의 힘이 세포에 침투해 있어요. 떼어낼 수가...
segments.text_en: No... the barrier stone's power has penetrated her cells. I can't remove it...

segments.speaker: nael
segments.text_en: Isn't there a way? Anything—

segments.text_ko: 세리아가 고개를 젓는다. 에리스의 손이 — 보는 앞에서 재로 부스러진다.
segments.text_en: Seria shakes her head. Eris's hand — crumbles to ash before their eyes.

segments.speaker: voldt
segments.text_ko: 안 돼. 안 돼, 에리스. 제발—
segments.text_en: No. No, Eris. Please—

segments.speaker: eris
segments.text_en: Don't cry.

segments.speaker: voldt
segments.text_en: How can I not cry—

segments.speaker: eris
segments.text_ko: 당신이 옳은 일을 했다는 걸 알아. 이르헨의 아이들이 말해줬어. 당신 때문에 살았다고. 그게 당신을 사랑한 이유야.
segments.text_en: I know you did the right thing. The children of Irhen told me. They survived because of you. That's why I loved you.

segments.speaker: eris
segments.text_ko: 한 가지만 약속해. 끝까지 싸워줘. 그리고 — 살아.
segments.text_en: Promise me one thing. Fight to the end. And — live.

segments.text_ko: 에리스의 몸이 재가 되어 흩어진다. 볼드의 팔에서. 천천히. 마지막으로 남는 것은 — 에리스의 머리핀 하나.
segments.text_en: Eris's body turns to ash and scatters. From Voldt's arms. Slowly. The last thing remaining — one of Eris's hairpins.

segments.text_ko: 볼드가 두 번째 머리핀을 방패에 단다. 일어선다.
segments.text_en: Voldt pins the second hairpin to his shield. Stands up.

segments.speaker: voldt
segments.text_en: I promised. To the end.

segments.text_ko: 카엘이 볼드의 어깨에 손을 올린다. 말은 하지 않는다.
segments.text_en: Kael places his hand on Voldt's shoulder. Says nothing.

segments.text_ko: 사저 최심부. 거대한 지하 공간. 결계석의 잔여 에너지가 방 전체에 흐르고 있다. 중앙에 모르간이 떠 있다. 피부가 균열 지고 빛이 새어나온다.
segments.text_en: The estate's deepest level. A vast underground space. Residual barrier stone energy fills the room. At the center, Morgan floats. Cracks in his skin seep light.

segments.speaker: morgan
segments.text_en: You've come. Rebels.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_en: Morgan. End this.

segments.speaker: morgan
segments.text_ko: 끝? 이제 시작이다. 시원화 따위 필요 없어. 내가 곧 결계가 되면 — 내가 세계를 지배한다.
segments.text_en: End? This is just the beginning. I don't need the Siwon Fire. Once I become the barrier — I will rule the world.

segments.text_ko: 모르간의 뒤에서 — 렌도르 교수가 걸어 나온다. 늙었고, 지쳐 있지만, 손에 봉인 마법진이 담긴 두루마리를 쥐고 있다.
segments.text_en: From behind Morgan — Professor Rendor steps forward. Old and exhausted, but holding a scroll containing a sealing magic circle.

segments.speaker: drana
segments.text_en: Professor—!

segments.speaker: rendor
segments.text_en: Drana... you made it here.

segments.speaker: morgan
segments.text_en: Still alive, old man?

segments.speaker: rendor
segments.text_ko: 내가 만든 기술이 이 괴물을 만들었다. 내가 막아야 한다.
segments.text_en: My technology created this monster. I must stop it.

segments.text_ko: 렌도르가 봉인 마법진을 펼친다. 봉인이 모르간을 감싸기 시작한다. 모르간의 움직임이 느려진다.
segments.text_en: Rendor unfurls the sealing circle. The seal begins wrapping around Morgan. Morgan's movements slow.

segments.speaker: morgan
segments.text_en: ...A futile effort.

segments.text_ko: 봉인이 깨진다. 충격파가 렌도르를 날린다. 벽에 부딪힌다. 입에서 피가 흐른다.
segments.text_en: The seal breaks. The shockwave sends Rendor flying. He hits the wall. Blood flows from his mouth.

segments.speaker: drana
segments.text_en: Professor—!

segments.speaker: rendor
segments.text_en: You were right, Drana.

segments.speaker: drana
segments.text_en: Don't talk. Healing — Seria!

segments.speaker: rendor
segments.text_ko: 들어라. 처음부터... 네가 옳았어. '거부했으면 됐다'고 말했지. 맞아. 거부했어야 했다.
segments.text_en: Listen. From the beginning... you were right. You said 'I should have refused.' You were right. I should have refused.

segments.speaker: rendor
segments.text_ko: 내 제자가 나보다 현명했다. 봉인 마법의 핵심 공식은 — 네가 알고 있다. 완성해라. 내가 실패한 것을.
segments.text_en: My student was wiser than me. The key formula for the sealing magic — you know it. Complete it. What I failed to do.

segments.speaker: drana
segments.text_en: Professor...!

segments.speaker: rendor
segments.text_en: It's okay to cry.

segments.text_ko: 드라나가 울지 않으려 한다. 하지만 눈물이 흐른다. 렌도르가 드라나의 손을 놓는다. 눈이 감긴다.
segments.text_en: Drana tries not to cry. But tears flow. Rendor releases Drana's hand. His eyes close.

segments.text_ko: 드라나가 렌도르를 내려놓는다. 일어선다. 안경을 벗어 눈물을 닦고 — 다시 쓴다.
segments.text_en: Drana lays Rendor down. Stands up. Takes off her glasses, wipes her tears — puts them back on.

segments.speaker: drana
segments.text_en: The sealing formula. I can complete it.

segments.speaker: irene
segments.text_en: Do you need time?

segments.speaker: drana
segments.text_ko: 모르간의 힘을 억제하는 동안 준비할게요. 3분이면 돼요.
segments.text_en: I'll prepare while Morgan's power is suppressed. Three minutes is all I need.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_en: Three minutes. We'll buy that for you.

segments.text_ko: 3턴 후. 드라나가 봉인 공식을 완성한다. 푸른 룬이 모르간을 감싼다.
segments.text_en: After three turns. Drana completes the sealing formula. Blue runes envelop Morgan.

segments.speaker: morgan
segments.text_en: Th...is is...

segments.speaker: drana
segments.text_en: This is my teacher's final lesson.

segments.speaker: drana
segments.text_ko: 버텨요. 하지만 오래는 안 돼요. 왕좌의 힘이 필요해요.
segments.text_en: It's holding. But not for long. We need the throne's power.

segments.text_ko: 왕궁 왕좌실. 연합군이 왕궁을 탈환했다. 칼드릭이 연금 상태로 왕좌 옆 바닥에 앉아 있다.
segments.text_en: The palace throne room. Allied forces have retaken the palace. Caldric sits on the floor beside the throne, still confined.
Voldt breaks the chains.

segments.speaker: voldt
segments.text_en: Your Majesty.

segments.speaker: caldric
segments.text_en: Voldt... is everyone safe?

segments.speaker: voldt
segments.text_en: Everyone is here.

segments.speaker: caldric
segments.text_en: You look like your mother.

segments.speaker: linen
segments.text_en: ...Father.

segments.speaker: caldric
segments.text_ko: 왕으로서는 실패했다. 아버지로서는 더 실패했다. 하지만 마지막으로 한 가지는 해야겠다.
segments.text_en: As king I failed. As father I failed even more. But there is one last thing I must do.

segments.text_ko: 칼드릭이 왕좌로 걸어간다. 엠버 스론. 마지막 불씨가 깜빡이고 있다.
segments.text_en: Caldric walks to the throne. The Ember Throne. Its last ember flickers.

segments.speaker: seria
segments.text_ko: 폐하, 안 돼요! 지금 왕좌에 앉으면 남은 생명력이—
segments.text_en: Your Majesty, no! If you sit on the throne now, your remaining life force—

segments.speaker: caldric
segments.text_ko: 알고 있다. 남은 시원화의 힘을 끌어내서 모르간의 폭주를 억누르겠다. 그 사이에 — 불씨 제전을.
segments.text_en: I know. I will draw out the remaining Siwon Fire's power to suppress Morgan's rampage. In that time — perform the Ember Rite.

segments.text_ko: 왕좌가 반응한다. 빛이 칼드릭을 감싼다. 생명력이 시원화로 흘러들어간다.
segments.text_en: The throne responds. Light envelops Caldric. Life force flows into the Siwon Fire.

segments.speaker: linen
segments.text_en: Father—! Stop!

segments.speaker: caldric
segments.text_en: Linen.

segments.speaker: caldric
segments.text_ko: 네가 선택해라. 왕좌가 아니라, 네가. 어떤 선택이든 — 아버지는 지지한다.
segments.text_en: You choose. Not the throne — you. Whatever you choose — your father supports you.

segments.speaker: caldric
segments.text_en: I entrust the temple to you.

segments.speaker: elmira
segments.text_en: Your Majesty.

segments.speaker: caldric
segments.text_en: I entrust this child to you.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_en: ...Yes.

segments.text_ko: 칼드릭의 몸에서 빛이 뿜어져 나온다. 시원화의 마지막 불씨가 — 왕의 생명력을 연료로 타오른다.
segments.text_en: Light bursts from Caldric's body. The Siwon Fire's last ember — burns using the king's life force as fuel.

segments.speaker: caldric
segments.text_en: I'm sorry. And... I love you.

segments.text_ko: 빛이 꺼진다. 왕좌에 — 칼드릭은 없다. 왕관만 의자 위에 놓여 있다.
segments.text_en: The light fades. On the throne — Caldric is gone. Only the crown rests upon the seat.

segments.text_ko: 리넨이 무릎을 꿇는다. 나엘이 리넨을 안는다. 카엘이 왕관을 들어올려 볼드에게 건넨다. 볼드가 왕관을 가슴에 안는다.
segments.text_en: Linen kneels. Nael holds Linen. Kael lifts the crown and hands it to Voldt. Voldt clutches it to his chest.

segments.text_ko: 엘미라가 칼드릭이 사라진 왕좌 앞에 무릎을 꿇는다. 기도한다. 그리고 일어선다.
segments.text_en: Elmira kneels before the throne where Caldric vanished. Prays. Then stands.

segments.speaker: elmira
segments.text_en: You were right.

segments.speaker: seria
segments.text_en: Master...

segments.speaker: elmira
segments.text_ko: 신은 진실을 감추라고 하지 않았어. 내가 겁이 나서 감춘 것이지. 더 이상 숨지 않겠다.
segments.text_en: God never told me to hide the truth. I hid it because I was afraid. I will hide no longer.

segments.speaker: seria
segments.text_en: Together.

segments.speaker: elmira
segments.text_en: Yes. Together.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 칼드릭 폐하가 시간을 벌어주셨습니다. 이 시간 안에 모르간을 쓰러뜨려야 합니다.
segments.text_en: King Caldric bought us time. We must defeat Morgan within that time.

segments.speaker: voldt
segments.text_en: I promised Eris. To fight to the end.

segments.speaker: grid
segments.text_ko: 나쁜 아빠지만, 딸이 자랄 세상은 지켜줘야지.
segments.text_en: I'm a bad father, but I need to protect the world my daughter will grow up in.

segments.speaker: roc
segments.text_en: I'm getting Pina back.

segments.speaker: drana
segments.text_en: I'll complete my teacher's magic.

segments.speaker: irene
segments.text_en: I've waited five years.

segments.speaker: cyr
segments.text_en: I've waited 100 years. This time I'll finish it.

segments.speaker: hazel
segments.text_en: Not by order — by will.

segments.speaker: annette
segments.text_en: By the general's side.

segments.speaker: linen
segments.text_en: Let's go.

segments.text_ko: 모르간의 사저 최심부. 드라나의 봉인이 금이 가기 시작한다. 모르간의 인간적 형태가 무너지기 시작한다. 반인반신.
segments.text_en: Morgan's estate depths. Drana's seal begins to crack. Morgan's human form starts to collapse. Half-human, half-divine.

segments.speaker: morgan
segments.text_ko: 왕좌 따위 필요 없다. 내가 곧 결계다. 내가 곧 세계다!
segments.text_en: I don't need the throne. I am the barrier. I am the world!

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_en: Everyone, prepare for battle.

segments.speaker: voldt
segments.text_en: Eris—!

segments.text_ko: 볼드가 에리스의 머리핀이 박힌 방패로 모르간의 일격을 막는다.
segments.text_en: Voldt blocks Morgan's strike with the shield bearing Eris's hairpins.

segments.speaker: grid
segments.text_ko: 나쁜 아빠지만— 딸이 자랄 세상은 지켜줘야지!
segments.text_en: I'm a bad father— but I need to protect the world my daughter will grow up in!

segments.speaker: hazel
segments.text_ko: 방어진 유지! 한 발도 물러서지 마!
segments.text_en: Hold the defensive line! Not one step back!

segments.speaker: irene
segments.text_en: His back! Where the crystals are concentrated!

segments.speaker: roc
segments.text_en: There.

segments.speaker: drana
segments.text_en: Professor. You're watching, aren't you?

segments.speaker: cyr
segments.text_en: With the weight of 100 years—

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_en: Now!
Everyone attacks together. Morgan falls.

segments.text_ko: 모르간이 바닥에 쓰러져 있다. 결계석의 결정이 몸에서 떨어져 나간다. 인간의 형태로 돌아가고 있다.
segments.text_en: Morgan lies on the ground. Barrier stone crystals fall from his body. He's returning to human form.

segments.speaker: morgan
segments.text_en: Why... don't you want the flame?

segments.speaker: morgan
segments.text_en: The reason you reject... eternal power...

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 영원한 건 없어. 그래서 지금이 소중한 거야.
segments.text_en: Nothing is eternal. That's why the present is precious.

segments.speaker: morgan
segments.text_en: ...Precious. So that's what it was.
Morgan's eyes close.

segments.text_ko: 왕좌실. 모르간이 쓰러지고, 시원화의 마지막 불씨만이 왕좌에 깜빡인다. 칼드릭이 벌어준 시간이 끝나간다.
segments.text_en: The throne room. Morgan has fallen, and only the Siwon Fire's last ember flickers on the throne. The time Caldric bought is running out.

segments.text_ko: 리넨이 왕좌 앞에 선다. 나엘이 리넨의 손을 잡고 있다.
segments.text_en: Linen stands before the throne. Nael holds Linen's hand.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 네가 결정해. 우리는 어떤 선택이든 함께야.
segments.text_en: You decide. We're with you no matter what.

segments.speaker: seria
segments.text_ko: 신은 답을 주지 않아. 사람이 선택하는 거야.
segments.text_en: God doesn't give answers. People make choices.

segments.speaker: cyr
segments.text_ko: 100년 전 나는 혼자 선택했다. 너는 혼자가 아니야.
segments.text_en: 100 years ago I chose alone. You are not alone.

segments.speaker: voldt
segments.text_en: Whatever the choice, Eris would have supported it too.

segments.speaker: drana
segments.text_ko: 어떤 길이든, 내가 만들 수 있는 건 만들어줄게.
segments.text_en: Whatever path, I'll create whatever I can.

segments.speaker: linen
segments.text_en: Nael.

segments.speaker: linen
segments.text_ko: 어떤 일이 있어도 — 네가 있었기에 여기까지 왔어.
segments.text_en: No matter what — I came this far because of you.

options.text_ko: 시원화 재점화 — 리넨의 불꽃을 시원화에 되돌린다.
options.text_en: Rekindle the Siwon Fire — Return Linen's flame to the Siwon Fire.

options.text_ko: 불꽃의 분산 — 시원화를 여러 불꽃으로 나눈다.
options.text_en: Disperse the Flame — Split the Siwon Fire into many flames.

segments.speaker: linen
segments.text_en: I'll return it to the Siwon Fire. The flame within me.

segments.text_ko: 의식이 시작된다. 세리아와 엘미라가 의식을 보조한다. 리넨의 몸에서 금빛 불꽃이 피어오르고 — 왕좌로 흘러들어간다.
segments.text_en: The ritual begins. Seria and Elmira assist. Golden flames bloom from Linen's body — flowing into the throne.

segments.text_ko: 시원화가 다시 타오르기 시작한다. 하지만 — 모르간의 잔여 힘이 반응한다. 불꽃이 폭주하기 시작한다.
segments.text_en: The Siwon Fire begins to burn again. But — Morgan's residual power reacts. The flame starts to rampage.

segments.speaker: drana
segments.text_en: It won't stabilize—!

segments.speaker: seria
segments.text_en: I'll hold it.

segments.speaker: elmira
segments.text_en: Seria, it's dangerous—

segments.speaker: seria
segments.text_en: I know. This is my choice.

segments.text_ko: 세리아가 자신의 생명력을 의식에 쏟아붓는다. 폭주하는 불꽃을 안정시킨다. 시원화가 다시 밝게 타오른다. 결계가 되살아난다.
segments.text_en: Seria pours her life force into the ritual. Stabilizes the rampaging flame. The Siwon Fire blazes bright again. The barrier revives.

segments.text_ko: 리넨의 몸이 빛에 감싸인다. 발이 투명해진다. 왕좌와 하나가 되어간다.
segments.text_en: Linen's body is wrapped in light. Her feet become transparent. She's becoming one with the throne.

segments.speaker: nael
segments.text_en: Linen—! Linen—!

segments.speaker: linen
segments.text_en: I'll remember. Everything.

segments.text_ko: 리넨이 왕좌 안에 잠든다. 사라지지는 않는다 — 하지만 인간으로서 움직이지 않는다. 시원화의 일부가 되었다.
segments.text_en: Linen sleeps within the throne. Not vanished — but no longer moving as a human. She has become part of the Siwon Fire.

segments.speaker: nael
segments.text_en: Remember. You promised.

segments.text_ko: 왕좌의 불빛이 한 번 흔들린다. 따뜻하게.
segments.text_en: The throne's light flickers once. Warmly.
Seria collapses. Kael rushes to catch her.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_en: Seria—!

segments.speaker: seria
segments.text_en: Kael?

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_en: I'm here.

segments.speaker: seria
segments.text_en: ...I can't see.

segments.speaker: seria
segments.text_ko: 의식의 대가인 것 같아요. 시력이... 있지?
segments.text_en: It must be the ritual's price. My sight... Are you there?

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_en: I'm here. I'm not going anywhere.

segments.speaker: seria
segments.text_en: Then that's enough.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_en: I'll be your eyes.
Epilogue.

segments.text_ko: 이르헨 재건지. 새 집들이 지어지고 있다. 카엘이 세리아의 손을 잡고 걷는다. 세리아의 눈에 붕대가 감겨 있다.
segments.text_en: Irhen reconstruction site. New houses are being built. Kael walks holding Seria's hand. Bandages wrap Seria's eyes.

segments.speaker: seria
segments.text_en: The wind smells nice. Like grass.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 라센 영감 소 냄새도 섞여 있어.
segments.text_en: Old Rasen's cattle smell is mixed in too.

segments.speaker: seria
segments.text_en: That's not so great.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_en: ...Even so, it's home.

segments.text_ko: 아스칼론 왕좌실. 나엘이 왕좌 앞에 꽃을 놓는다. 매일 그렇듯이. 수년 뒤. 여전히 매일 꽃을 놓는다.
segments.text_en: Ascalon throne room. Nael places flowers before the throne. As she does every day. Years later. She still places flowers every day.

segments.speaker: linen
segments.text_en: I remember.

segments.speaker: nael
segments.text_en: Me too.

segments.text_ko: 왕도. 볼드가 '에리스 고아원' 앞에 서 있다. 이렌이 옆에서 서류를 정리하고 있다. 아이들이 뛰어다닌다.
segments.text_en: The capital. Voldt stands before 'Eris Orphanage.' Irene organizes documents beside him. Children run about.

segments.text_ko: 벨마르 항구. 작은 어선. 그리드와 마리나가 나란히 앉아 있다.
segments.text_en: Belmar port. A small fishing boat. Grid and Marina sit side by side.

segments.speaker: marina
segments.text_en: Dad, I caught a fish!

segments.speaker: grid
segments.text_en: That's seaweed.

segments.speaker: marina
segments.text_en: Seaweed counts too!

segments.speaker: grid
segments.text_en: Yeah, you caught it.

segments.text_ko: 실바렌 숲. 로크가 결계석 앞에 서 있다. 피나의 핑크 리본을 결계석에 묶어둔다.
segments.text_en: Silvaren Forest. Roc stands before the barrier stone. Ties Pina's pink ribbon to it.

segments.speaker: roc
segments.text_en: I'll keep watch.

segments.text_ko: 왕립 마법학원. 드라나가 강의실에 서 있다. 렌도르의 연구실 문에 새긴 문구: '윤리 없는 학문은 칼날 없는 검이다.'
segments.text_en: Royal Academy of Magic. Drana stands in a lecture hall. An inscription on Rendor's lab door: 'Scholarship without ethics is a blade without an edge.'

segments.speaker: drana
segments.text_ko: 첫 번째 질문. 이 연구가 누구를 위한 것인지 먼저 생각하세요.
segments.text_en: First question. Think about who this research is for.

segments.text_ko: 이르헨 재건지. 대장간 앞. 시르가 서 있다. 갑옷의 재 기운이 빠져 — 밝은 색으로 돌아가고 있다. 100년 만에 완전한 인간.
segments.text_en: Irhen reconstruction site. Before the forge. Cyr stands. The ash is fading from her armor — returning to bright colors. Fully human for the first time in 100 years.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_en: Have you decided where to go?

segments.speaker: cyr
segments.text_ko: 없다. 100년 전의 고향은 이름도 남지 않았으니.
segments.text_en: No. My home from 100 years ago doesn't even have a name anymore.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 우리도 고향을 잃었던 사람들이에요. 여기, 자리 있어요.
segments.text_en: We were people who lost our home too. Here — there's room.

segments.speaker: cyr
segments.text_en: ...Alright. I'll take you up on that.

segments.text_ko: 불꽃은 영원하지 않다. 하지만 그 온기는 남는다.
segments.text_en: Flame is not eternal. But its warmth endures.

segments.speaker: linen
segments.text_en: I'll split it. The Siwon Fire.

segments.text_ko: 의식이 시작된다. 불씨 제전의 서 — 역순. 리넨의 몸에서 금빛 불꽃이 피어오른다. 하나의 큰 불꽃이 — 여러 개의 작은 불꽃으로 갈라진다. 아름답다.
segments.text_en: The ritual begins. The Ember Rite Scroll — in reverse. Golden flames bloom from Linen's body. One great flame — splits into many small flames. Beautiful.

segments.speaker: drana
segments.text_ko: 불꽃이 분산되고 있어요. 각 지방의 결계석 잔영에 이끌려—
segments.text_en: The flames are dispersing. Drawn to each region's barrier stone traces—

segments.text_ko: 작은 불꽃들이 왕좌실 벽을 통과해 사라진다. 이르헨으로, 하르벤으로, 실바렌으로, 벨마르로, 크로우펠로.
segments.text_en: Small flames pass through the throne room walls and vanish. To Irhen, Harben, Silvaren, Belmar, Crowfel.

segments.text_ko: 엠버 스론의 불꽃이 꺼진다. 거대한 왕좌가 — 그저 빈 의자가 된다.
segments.text_en: The Ember Throne's flame goes out. The great throne — becomes merely an empty chair.
Linen collapses. Light fades from her body.

segments.speaker: nael
segments.text_en: Linen—!

segments.speaker: seria
segments.text_ko: 살아 있어요. 하지만 의식이... 불꽃과 함께 기억도 흩어졌을 수 있어요.
segments.text_en: She's alive. But her consciousness... the memories may have scattered with the flame.

segments.speaker: nael
segments.text_en: I'll wait. As long as it takes.

segments.text_ko: 하루가 지난다. 이틀이 지난다. 나엘은 리넨 곁을 떠나지 않는다.
segments.text_en: One day passes. Two days pass. Nael doesn't leave Linen's side.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_en: Nael, you need to rest too—

segments.speaker: nael
segments.text_ko: 이 사람이 눈을 뜰 때 제가 없으면 안 돼요.
segments.text_en: I need to be here when she opens her eyes.

segments.text_ko: 사흘째 새벽. 창으로 첫 빛이 들어온다. 리넨의 손가락이 움직인다.
segments.text_en: Third day, dawn. First light enters through the window. Linen's fingers move.

segments.text_ko: 리넨이 눈을 뜬다. 천천히. 나엘의 얼굴을 본다.
segments.text_en: Linen opens her eyes. Slowly. She sees Nael's face.

segments.speaker: linen
segments.text_en: ...Who are you?

segments.text_ko: 나엘의 세계가 멈춘다. 불꽃과 함께 기억도 전부 사라졌다.
segments.text_en: Nael's world stops. Along with the flame, all memories are gone.

segments.speaker: linen
segments.text_en: ...You seem familiar somehow. Why are you crying?

segments.text_ko: 나엘이 눈물을 삼킨다. 그리고 — 미소 짓는다.
segments.text_en: Nael swallows her tears. And — smiles.

segments.speaker: nael
segments.text_en: I'm Nael.

segments.speaker: linen
segments.text_en: Nael...

segments.speaker: nael
segments.text_en: We can get to know each other from now on.

segments.speaker: linen
segments.text_en: ...It's warm.

segments.speaker: nael
segments.text_en: Yes. It's warm.
A love starting over from the beginning.
Epilogue.

segments.text_ko: 이르헨. 새 결계석이 빛나고 있다. 마을 자리에 새 집들이 올라간다. 카엘이 대장간에서 망치를 두드리고 있다. 세리아가 옆 건물에 '진료소'라는 간판을 달고 있다.
segments.text_en: Irhen. A new barrier stone shines. New houses rise where the village stood. Kael hammers in the forge. Seria hangs a 'Clinic' sign on the building next door.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_en: Maybe I should just run the forge again here.

segments.speaker: seria
segments.text_en: Sure. I'll open a clinic next door.

segments.text_ko: 실바렌 숲. 숲 한가운데 새 결계석이 빛나고 있다. 결계석 옆에 소녀가 서 있다. 피나. 10년 전 사라졌을 때의 모습 그대로.
segments.text_en: Silvaren Forest. A new barrier stone shines in the forest's heart. A girl stands beside it. Pina. Exactly as she was when she vanished ten years ago.

segments.speaker: pina
segments.text_en: Brother! You're late!

segments.text_ko: 로크가 달려간다. 피나를 안는다. 처음으로 운다. 소리 내어 운다.
segments.text_en: Roc runs to her. Embraces Pina. Cries for the first time. Cries out loud.

segments.speaker: pina
segments.text_en: Why are you crying? The squirrel will worry.

segments.speaker: roc
segments.text_en: The squirrel... will worry...

segments.text_ko: 아스칼론. 에리스의 무덤. 볼드가 무덤 앞에 앉아 있다. 이렌이 옆에 와서 앉는다. 아무 말 없이.
segments.text_en: Ascalon. Eris's grave. Voldt sits before the grave. Irene comes and sits beside him. Without a word.

segments.speaker: voldt
segments.text_en: It's over. I kept my promise.

segments.text_ko: 벨마르 항구. 그리드와 마리나가 바다로 나간다.
segments.text_en: Belmar port. Grid and Marina head out to sea.

segments.speaker: marina
segments.text_en: Dad! Catch that fish for me!

segments.speaker: grid
segments.text_en: ...So it's okay to live like this.

segments.text_ko: 나엘이 리넨에게 세계를 보여준다. 두 사람이 나란히 걷는다.
segments.text_en: Nael shows Linen the world. The two walk side by side.

segments.speaker: linen
segments.text_ko: 여기... 와본 적 있는 것 같아요.
segments.text_en: I feel like... I've been here before.

segments.speaker: nael
segments.text_en: Yes. We came here together.

segments.speaker: linen
segments.text_ko: 나엘. 나한테 옛날 이야기 더 해줘요.
segments.text_en: Nael. Tell me more old stories about us.

segments.speaker: nael
segments.text_en: Sure. As many as you want.

segments.text_ko: 대륙 끝. 결계의 경계선. 시르가 경계선에 서 있다. 두 세계 사이를 오가는 '문지기'.
segments.text_en: The continent's edge. The barrier boundary. Cyr stands at the boundary. A 'gatekeeper' between two worlds.

segments.speaker: ash_lord
segments.text_en: Flame and ash coexist.

segments.speaker: cyr
segments.text_en: It should have been that way from the start.

segments.speaker: ash_lord
segments.text_en: This time — may it last.

segments.speaker: cyr
segments.text_en: It will last. Because we're not alone.

segments.text_ko: 왕립 마법학원. 드라나가 렌도르의 연구를 이어간다.
segments.text_en: Royal Academy of Magic. Drana continues Rendor's research.

segments.speaker: drana
segments.text_en: 'Not 'why' but 'for whom' — that's the question scholarship should ask first.'

segments.text_ko: 마지막 장면. 이르헨 새 마을 광장. 새 결계석이 빛나고 있다. 아이들이 결계석 주변에서 뛰어놀고 있다.
segments.text_en: Final scene. New Irhen village square. A new barrier stone shines. Children play around it.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_en: ...This was a good place. It will be a good place again.
The barrier stone shines. Warmly.

segments.text_ko: 영원한 불꽃은 없다. 하지만 작은 불꽃들은, 함께 타면, 오래간다.
segments.text_en: No flame is eternal. But small flames, burning together, last a long time.
